description_long: This pedestrian adult is depicted as a young woman with a modern, urban style. She wears a cropped, asymmetrical top with one long sleeve and one sleeveless side, paired with fitted pants that have utility pockets and a belt. Her accessories include a beanie hat with a playful design and fingerless gloves, adding to her streetwear aesthetic. She has visible tattoos and a mechanical or cybernetic arm, suggesting a futuristic or cyberpunk influence. Her footwear consists of chunky, high-heeled boots, and she carries a pouch or tool bag on her hip. Her hair is styled in a short, straight bob that peeks out from under her hat.
description: A young woman in urban streetwear with a beanie, asymmetrical top, utility pants, and chunky boots, featuring a cybernetic arm and visible tattoos.
description_view_0: Back view showing the beanie, cropped top with one sleeve, utility pants, and boots, as well as the pouch on her hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of her face, the asymmetrical top, and the mechanical arm.
description_view_2: Front view displaying her facial features, tattoos, cybernetic arm, and the full details of her outfit and accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the cropped top, and the details of her boots and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a cropped asymmetrical top, utility pants, beanie hat, fingerless gloves, and a tool pouch
